message:
fix(maintenance): cancellation-safe subprocess polling replaces blocking Command::output()

Command::output() blocks indefinitely — if git maintenance hangs during
server shutdown, the maintenance thread never joins and the process stalls.
Replace with spawn()+try_wait() polling loop that checks SHUTDOWN every
250ms and kills the child on signal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
